CustomField.description: Number of days to look back when determining which Recurring Donations need recalculation in the nightly batch job. Only Recurring Donations with Opportunities modified within this many days will be included. Default is 31. Only applies when Limit Recalculated Recurring Donations is enabled. Time-bound Recurring Donation rollup batch jobs override this value.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Days to look back for modified Opportunities on Recurring Donations. Default is 31. Only applies when Limit Recalculated Recurring Donations is enabled.
CustomField.label: RD Modified in Last Number of Days
